question: Bitcoin $150K in 2025?
resolution_criteria:
Resolution Criteria:

The market resolves “Yes” if Bitcoin (BTC) reaches or exceeds $150,000 USD at any point in 2025, based on data from Coinbase. The price must be reflected as the high/low price in any 1-minute candlestick during the year. If Bitcoin does not hit $150K during 2025, the market resolves “No.”

Resolution Date & Time: December 31, 2025, at 23:59 PST, or earlier if Bitcoin crosses $150K at any time during the year.
